instructions: Create a CSS file and register it in the `customCss` array in `astro.config.mjs`
Override CSS custom properties (--sl-*) on `:root` to change colors and typography
Never use `.dark` class selectors — Starlight uses `data-theme='dark'` attribute
Install `@astrojs/starlight-tailwind` when using Tailwind with Starlight
Import `@astrojs/starlight-tailwind` before Tailwind's own CSS imports
Layer order must be: `@astrojs/starlight-tailwind`, then `tailwindcss/theme.css`, then `tailwindcss/utilities.css`
Use `@theme` block to map Tailwind color tokens to Starlight's `--color-accent-*` and `--color-gray-*` variables
Never mix --sl-* CSS variables with Tailwind @theme overrides for the same property
Always include `font-display: swap` in custom @font-face rules
Use Fontsource for zero-config font loading: install package and add to `customCss`
Use the Starlight color theme editor to generate accent/gray palettes
